raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Richmond San-Rafael Bridge traffic congestion causes local streets and roads to back up in the City of Richmond.",
    "Approximately 18,000 Bay Area residents cross the Richmond San-Rafael Bridge each workday.",
    "During peak hours, commuters on the Richmond San-Rafael Bridge face approximately 16 minutes of gridlocked, stop-and-go traffic, which is predicted to grow to 24 minutes in the next three years.",
    "The morning freeway backup on the Richmond San-Rafael Bridge has become the largest source of non-wildfire air pollution in the City of Richmond.",
    "Commuters on the Richmond-San Rafael Bridge are generally lower-income and reside in historically underserved and systemically marginalized communities.",
    "There have been no near-term projects to reduce the congestion and pollution disproportionately affecting low-income communities in the City of Richmond.",
    "Adding a second movable-barrier bike lane on the lower deck of the Richmond-San Rafael Bridge allows for active management of traffic."
  ]
}
```
